productDisplayName: Lee Women Kylie Navy Blue Top
description: CompositionNavy blue top made of knitted 100% cotton, has a wide round neck, short, raglan sleeves, printed, woven panels with lace edging across the chest and elasticated hemFitRegularWash careHand wash cold using mild detergentWash dark colours seperatelyDo not bleach, iron or scrub on embroidery & printDo not wring or tumble dryFlat dry in shadeMild ironThis super soft navy blue top with draped short sleeves and pretty lace and patchwork detailing across the chest, is the season's summer essential. lee can be relied upon to offer us something special, and they don't disappoint with this cute top. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
